auth.label: API Key
auth.description: The Odds API key sent as the apiKey query parameter.

actions.name: get_event_odds
actions.description: Get odds for one The Odds API event.

sport.description: The sport key returned by The Odds API sports endpoint, or upcoming for the next live and upcoming games across all sports.

eventId.description: The event ID returned by The Odds API.

items.description: A single The Odds API comma-list value.

regions.description: Bookmaker regions to request, such as us, us2, uk, au, or eu.

items.description: A single The Odds API comma-list value.

markets.description: Betting market keys to request, such as h2h, spreads, or totals.

dateFormat.description: Timestamp format returned by The Odds API.

oddsFormat.description: Odds format returned by The Odds API.

items.description: A single The Odds API comma-list value.

bookmakers.description: Bookmaker keys used to filter event odds.

includeLinks.description: Whether bookmaker event, market, and betslip links are included.

includeSids.description: Whether source IDs are included when available.

includeBetLimits.description: Whether bet limits are included when available.

includeMultipliers.description: Whether DFS multipliers are included when available.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading odds for a single The Odds API event.

eventOdds.description: Single-event odds payload returned by The Odds API.

quota.description: The Odds API quota headers returned with the response, when available.

outputSchema.description: Single-event odds returned by The Odds API.

actions.name: get_odds
actions.description: Get live and upcoming odds for a sport from The Odds API.

sport.description: The sport key returned by The Odds API sports endpoint, or upcoming for the next live and upcoming games across all sports.

items.description: A single The Odds API comma-list value.

regions.description: Bookmaker regions to request, such as us, us2, uk, au, or eu.

items.description: A single The Odds API comma-list value.

markets.description: Betting market keys to request, such as h2h, spreads, or totals.

dateFormat.description: Timestamp format returned by The Odds API.

oddsFormat.description: Odds format returned by The Odds API.

items.description: A single The Odds API comma-list value.

eventIds.description: Event IDs used to filter odds.

items.description: A single The Odds API comma-list value.

bookmakers.description: Bookmaker keys used to filter odds.

commenceTimeFrom.description: ISO 8601 timestamp used by The Odds API to filter event commence time.

commenceTimeTo.description: ISO 8601 timestamp used by The Odds API to filter event commence time.

includeLinks.description: Whether bookmaker event, market, and betslip links are included.

includeSids.description: Whether source IDs are included when available.

includeBetLimits.description: Whether bet limits are included when available.

includeRotationNumbers.description: Whether home and away rotation numbers are included.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading odds from The Odds API.

odds.description: Event odds returned by The Odds API.

quota.description: The Odds API quota headers returned with the response, when available.

outputSchema.description: Odds returned by The Odds API.

actions.name: get_scores
actions.description: Get live and recent completed scores for a sport from The Odds API.

sport.description: The sport key returned by The Odds API sports endpoint, or upcoming for the next live and upcoming games across all sports.

daysFrom.description: Number of days in the past from which to return completed scores.

dateFormat.description: Timestamp format returned by The Odds API.

items.description: A single The Odds API comma-list value.

eventIds.description: Event IDs used to filter scores.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading scores from The Odds API.

scores.description: Event scores returned by The Odds API.

quota.description: The Odds API quota headers returned with the response, when available.

outputSchema.description: Scores returned by The Odds API.

actions.name: list_event_markets
actions.description: List recently seen market keys for one The Odds API event.

sport.description: The sport key returned by The Odds API sports endpoint, or upcoming for the next live and upcoming games across all sports.

eventId.description: The event ID returned by The Odds API.

items.description: A single The Odds API comma-list value.

regions.description: Bookmaker regions to request, such as us, us2, uk, au, or eu.

items.description: A single The Odds API comma-list value.

bookmakers.description: Bookmaker keys used to filter event markets.

dateFormat.description: Timestamp format returned by The Odds API.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing recently seen markets for a The Odds API event.

sport_key.description: The sport key for this event.

sport_title.description: The sport title for this event.

commence_time.description: The event commence time in the requested date format.

last_update.description: When this market was last seen by The Odds API.

items.description: A market key object returned by The Odds API.

markets.description: Recently seen market keys for this bookmaker.

items.description: A bookmaker with recently seen markets.

bookmakers.description: Bookmakers with recently seen markets for this event.

eventMarkets.description: Event market payload returned by The Odds API.

quota.description: The Odds API quota headers returned with the response, when available.

outputSchema.description: Event markets returned by The Odds API.

actions.name: list_events
actions.description: List live and upcoming events for a sport from The Odds API.

sport.description: The sport key returned by The Odds API sports endpoint, or upcoming for the next live and upcoming games across all sports.

dateFormat.description: Timestamp format returned by The Odds API.

items.description: A single The Odds API comma-list value.

eventIds.description: Event IDs used to filter events.

commenceTimeFrom.description: ISO 8601 timestamp used by The Odds API to filter event commence time.

commenceTimeTo.description: ISO 8601 timestamp used by The Odds API to filter event commence time.

includeRotationNumbers.description: Whether home and away rotation numbers are included.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing events from The Odds API.

sport_key.description: The sport key for this event.

sport_title.description: The sport title for this event.

commence_time.description: The event commence time in the requested date format.

items.description: An event object returned by The Odds API.

events.description: Event objects returned by The Odds API.

quota.description: The Odds API quota headers returned with the response, when available.

outputSchema.description: Events returned by The Odds API.

actions.name: list_participants
actions.description: List participants for a sport from The Odds API.

sport.description: The sport key returned by The Odds API sports endpoint, or upcoming for the next live and upcoming games across all sports.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing participants from The Odds API.

items.description: A participant returned by The Odds API.

participants.description: Participant objects returned by The Odds API.

quota.description: The Odds API quota headers returned with the response, when available.

outputSchema.description: Participants returned by The Odds API.

actions.name: list_sports
actions.description: List sports supported by The Odds API.

all.description: Whether to include both in-season and out-of-season sports.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing sports from The Odds API.

items.description: A sport object returned by The Odds API.

sports.description: Sport objects returned by The Odds API.

quota.description: The Odds API quota headers returned with the response, when available.

outputSchema.description: Sports returned by The Odds API.
